template.name: Room

location.label: T[i]' == minute*( (T[j] - T[i])*U_partition*A / mc_room + (T[k] - T[i])*U_partition*A / mc_room + (T_ambient - T[i])*U_exterior*A / mc_room + (T_ambient - T[i])*U_exterior*A / mc_room + P[i] / mc_room )
Equations explained in global declarations. Assuming 4 rooms with 2 exterior walls of 4m² and 2 interior walls of 4m² each.

query.formula: strategy chill = minE(sum (i:int[0,3]) (fabs(T[i] - 19))) [<=600] {} -> {T[0], T[1], T[2], T[3]} : <> time >= 600
simulate[<=600;1] {T[0], T[1], T[2], T[3]} under NE
